title: Beskar
description: This mod is part of a Star Wars modpack being developed with Mossy. The pack is not released yet. It introduces Beskar and the devastated world of Mandalore after the Empire, featuring a harsh glassed landscape. The mod is currently in early development.
body:
Beskar is a Star Wars inspired Minecraft mod set on the devastated world of Mandalore after the fall of the Empire. The planet has been glassed by orbital bombardment, leaving behind a barren, crystallized wasteland of fused green terrain, fractured rock, and scattered ruins.

The mod introduces Beskar as a new resource, along with Mandalorian themed content including armor, weapons, and technology. Players will explore hostile environments shaped by destruction, where survival depends on adapting to harsh conditions rather than thriving ecosystems. The addition of Beskar brings many new challenges to overcome.

If you want to use this mod in your modpack, you will need Cosmic Horizons and Starlance.
